summary: Tested ProjectHub UX improvements: pencil icon visibility fix and Media Bin thumbnail grid. All 10 features verified working.

features_tested.feature: Pencil icon always visible (opacity-50, not opacity-0)
Clicking pencil activates inline rename input
Escape key cancels rename without saving
Renamed project name persists in topbar
Quick actions: only 2 cards (New Chat, Upload to Media Bin)
Media Bin section in right panel
Media Bin empty state with upload icon
Media Bin empty state shows 'No reference files' text
Media Bin empty state shows 'Upload files' link
Media Bin grid has grid-cols-3 class (code verified)
Media delete button has opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 (hover-dependent)
Hidden file input for upload present

code_verification.pencil_button_classes: p-1 rounded-md em-text-muted opacity-50 hover:opacity-100 hover:text-[var(--em-cyan)] hover:bg-[rgba(0,229,255,0.08)] transition-all duration-150

seed_data_creation: Project renamed to 'Blur Test 387013' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProjectHub UX improvements fully tested. Pencil icon is always visible (opacity-50) next to project title - NOT hover-dependent. Media Bin uses grid-cols-3 for thumbnail layout. Quick actions reduced to 2 cards only. Media delete button appears on tile hover (opacity-0 -> opacity-100). All rename flows (Enter, Blur, Escape) working correctly.
